name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new script, capability, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

## Problem
What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution
How should SOK solve this?

## SOK Convention Checklist
- [ ] Would have `[switch]$DryRun` as first param
- [ ] Would use KB units for size reporting
- [ ] Would integrate with SOK-Common for logging
- [ ] Would have `#Requires` statements
- [ ] Would be SYSTEM-context safe (if scheduled)

## Alternatives Considered
What else did you consider?
